name: v1alpha1ResourceResult
description: v1alpha1ResourceResult schema from Argo CD API

group.name: Group specifies the API group of the resource

hookPhase.description:
HookPhase contains the state of any operation associated with this resource OR hook
This can also contain values for non-hook resources.

hookType.name: HookType specifies the type of the hook. Empty for non-hook resources

images.name: Images contains the images related to the ResourceResult

kind.name: Kind specifies the API kind of the resource

message.name: Message contains an informational or error message for the last sync OR operation

name.name: Name specifies the name of the resource

namespace.name: Namespace specifies the target namespace of the resource

status.name: Status holds the final result of the sync. Will be empty if the resources is yet to be applied/pruned and is always zero-value for hooks

syncPhase.name: SyncPhase indicates the particular phase of the sync that this result was acquired in

version.name: Version specifies the API version of the resource
